item.title: Anthropic warns investors against secondary platforms offering access to its shares
item.dc:creator: Ram Iyer
item.description: The company named Open Doors Partners, Unicorns Exchange, Pachamama Capital, Lionheart Ventures, Hiive, Forge Global, Sydecar and Upmarket as companies that are not authorized to provide access to buy or sell its shares.

item.title: Potholes cost cities millions: This company is using AI and trucks to fix them
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
item.description: Fleet management company Samsara has developed an AI model to detect different kinds of potholes and gauge how fast they're deteriorating.

item.title: Report: Google and SpaceX in talks to put data centers into orbit
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan
item.description: Google and SpaceX are in talks to build data centers in orbit, pitching space as the future home for AI compute, even as costs today remain far higher than on the ground.

item.title: Everything Google announced at its Android Show, from Googlebooks to vibe-coded widgets
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez, Ivan Mehta, Aisha Malik
item.description: Google unveiled its new AI-first Googlebooks laptops, more agentic Gemini features, vibe-coded Android widgets, Gemini in Chrome, refreshed Android Auto, and more ahead of I/O.

item.title: The AI legal services industry is heating up. Anthropic is getting in on the action.
item.dc:creator: Lucas Ropek
item.description: As the AI legal services industry heats up, Anthropic is launching its own suite of features designed to assist law firms.

item.title: Android adds a feature to stop you from doomscrolling
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez
item.description: Google’s new Android feature, Pause Point, forces you to wait before opening distracting apps in an effort to curb addictive scrolling habits.

item.title: Google unveils Googlebooks, a new line of AI-native laptops
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: The company says Googlebooks, which are launching this fall, are the first laptops designed from the ground up for Gemini Intelligence to offer personal and proactive help.

item.title: Google’s ‘Create My Widget’ feature will let you vibe code your own widgets
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: The new feature will first launch on the latest Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel phones this summer.

item.title: Google brings agentic AI and vibe-coded widgets to Android
item.dc:creator: Ivan Mehta
item.description: Gemini Intelligence will also include Gboard based dictation and form filling capabilities

item.title: Google launches new Android security feature to help uncover spyware attacks
item.dc:creator: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai
item.description: Intrusion Logging is a new part of Android’s Advanced Protection Mode, which aims to help protect human rights activists, journalists, and dissidents from government spyware attack and law enforcement forensic devices.

item.title: Indigo brings the open social web to one app
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez
item.description: Indigo's new social app lets you cross-post to the open social web, including Mastodon and Bluesky, and browse a unified timeline.

item.title: U.S. bank disclose security lapse after sharing customer data with AI app
item.dc:creator: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai
item.description: The bank said the security lapse was due to the use of an “unauthorized” AI software app.

item.title: Threads tests a Meta AI integration that works similarly to Grok
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: The feature is designed to help people get real-time context about trends and breaking stories, as well as receive recommendations, all within conversations.

item.title: Exaforce raises $125M Series B to build AI for catching and stopping cyberattacks as they happen
item.dc:creator: Marina Temkin
item.description: As bad actors weaponize AI to exploit software vulnerabilities at unprecedented speed, companies are increasingly recognizing the need to bolster their cybersecurity defenses. The round valued the three-year-old startup at $725 million.

item.title: Waymo issues recall to deal with a flooding problem
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
item.description: Waymo has issued a software recall that makes its robotaxis more cautious around flooded areas. A "final remedy" is in the works.

item.title: Instructure strikes deal with hackers who breached it twice
item.dc:creator: Zack Whittaker
item.description: The maker of the Canvas school software said it "reached an agreement" with the hackers, but provided no guarantees that the hackers would not release the data or keep their word.

item.title: Dessn raises $6M for its production focused design tool
item.dc:creator: Ivan Mehta
item.description: A new startup called Dessn has raised $6M to build AI-powered design tools that work directly with production codebases.

item.title: TikTok now wants to be the place you book the trip you just saw on TikTok
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: TikTok is systematically converting its discovery engine into a transaction layer, which both deepens user retention and opens entirely new revenue streams for its new owners.

item.title: Spotify’s launches a Wrapped-style recap of your entire listening history
item.dc:creator: Ivan Mehta
item.description: Spotify's new feature will show you the number of unique songs that you listened to until now

item.title: AI voice startup Vapi hits $500M valuation after winning Amazon Ring over 40 rivals
item.dc:creator: Jagmeet Singh
item.description: Vapi says its enterprise business has grown 10-fold since early 2025 as companies shift customer support and sales calls to AI agents.
